>  none2@pci2:0:0: class=0x020000 card=0x43401148 chip=0x436411ab rev=0x12 hdr=0x00
 >       vendor   = 'Marvell Semiconductor (Was: Galileo Technology Ltd)'
 >       class    = network
 >       subclass = ethernet

I think it's Marvell Yukon II Gigabit NIC and it's supported by
msk(4) on CURRENT.
Would you please update to CURRENT and give it spin?
